title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
